features.title: Full-Stack AI Matrix
features.subtitle: 8 core modules covering every AI scenario

chat.name: AI Chat
chat.desc: Multi-model intelligent chat with GPT-4o / Claude 4 / Gemini 2.5. Context memory and multi-turn reasoning.

agent.name: AI Agent
agent.desc: Autonomous planning, tool use, and multi-step reasoning. Let AI think and execute complex tasks like a human.

workflow.name: Workflow
workflow.desc: Visual workflow orchestration, drag-and-drop design, automate complex business processes without code.

mcp.name: MCP Tools
mcp.desc: Model Context Protocol native support, 100+ plug-and-play tools, seamless external service integration.

knowledge.name: Knowledge Base
knowledge.desc: Intelligent document parsing and vector retrieval. Supports PDF/web/code with RAG-enhanced answers.

video.name: AI Video
video.desc: Sora / Runway / Kling one-click generation. Text-to-video, image-to-video, and video editing.

image.name: AI Image
image.desc: DALL-E / Stable Diffusion / Flux full model coverage. High-quality image generation and editing.

audio.name: AI Audio
audio.desc: TTS, voice cloning, and music generation. Multi-language, multi-voice real-time synthesis.

items.quote: AIOS completely transformed how our team works. Agents automate 80% of repetitive tasks, and Workflow makes complex processes simple.
items.name: Alex Zhang

items.quote: As a designer, the AI Image and Video features boosted my productivity 10x. One platform for all AI creative needs — incredibly convenient.
items.name: Sarah Lee

items.quote: The MCP tool integration is incredibly powerful. We connected all our internal systems through AIOS and built a complete intelligent workflow.
items.name: David Wang

items.q: Which AI models does AIOS support?
items.a: 50+ models including GPT-4o, Claude 4, Gemini 2.5, DeepSeek V3, Qwen 3, and more. One-click switching with auto-routing to the optimal provider.
MCP (Model Context Protocol) is an open standard that lets AI models securely connect to external tools and data sources. AIOS includes 100+ plug-and-play MCP tools.
Enterprise-grade security: encrypted API key storage, RBAC permissions, audit logs, WAF protection. Meets enterprise compliance requirements. Supports on-premise deployment.
Yes. We offer complete on-premise deployment including Docker/K8s, local data storage, and custom model integration for enterprise customers.

items.q: What's the difference between Workflow and Agent?
items.a: Workflow is for automating fixed processes. Agent is for tasks requiring autonomous decisions. They can be combined to build intelligent business systems.
Create a free account to start. The free plan includes basic model credits and core features. Enterprise users can contact sales for custom plans.
